race.comment: HOOT 'N' HOLLER (3) resumes and she filled a minor placing when returning from a spell last time in work over 1100m at Toowoomba. Has been racing in stronger company and has an inside gate and a handy 2kg claim. Has won twice this trip, and the betting will be key. APOLLO TEN (1) is a distance specialist who has been racing in much tougher in town. Was close up twice at Eagle Farm before the latest and has the blinkers on again. Will go close with average luck. ELECTRIC ARROW (8) resumed over 1000m at Eagle Farm in a 68, beaten 2L. Has more up the sleeve and from a handy gate can improve into the finish. LUCKY LASS (12) is close to breaking through after two consecutive placings, the latest over 1100m at Toowoomba. Finds a suitable race and can play a major role.
